pageDesc.desc: Manage your template list and provide quick deployment of MCP service instances
pageDesc.compress: The code package has been pressurized at

rules.name: Please enter the template name
rules.environmentId: Please select the environment in which the code package will run
rules.validForm: Please complete the form information and try again

mcpServers.name: McpServer must exist
mcpServers.serverName: There must be an MCP service present
mcpServers.regexServerName: The MCP service name can only consist of uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, horizontal lines, and underscores, and cannot start with a number
mcpServers.type: The protocol type needs to be sse or steamable http
mcpServers.transport: The transport field needs to be sse or steamable http
mcpServers.command: The command field needs to be filled in

action.deleteBox: Are you sure to delete this instance?
action.detection: Detection successful; Service is connected normally
action.deleteToken: Are you sure to delete this token? After deleting a valid token, requests using that token will not pass verification.
action.random: Are you sure to reproduce the token? After regenerating the token, requests using the token will not pass verification.

pageDesc.desc: Manage your instance list and provide URL links
pageDesc.confirmEdit: After editing the instance, it will restart; Are you sure about editing?
pageDesc.packStatusTips: There is a delay in the status, and container operation can be checked through status detection or log viewing.

tableHeadDesc.token: After enabling token authentication, token verification will be activated, and accessing MCP services requires carrying the token Token

formData.title: Add a new MCP
formData.mcpServersPlaceholder: Please enter the MCP server configuration in JSON format,Example:
formData.initScriptTips: The initialization script needs to ensure that it can eventually exit after execution and cannot be blocked, otherwise it cannot be started

rules.name: Please enter the instance name
rules.nameMax40: The instance name cannot exceed 40 characters

log.title: Instance of Logs
log.timeTips: Only logs within 24 hours are retained; data beyond the time range will be automatically cleared
log.expanded: Click to expand the complete log
log.timeRangeError: Time range cannot exceed 24 hours, end time has been automatically adjusted

token.title: Security authentication token
token.placeholderDate: Please select an expiration date, otherwise it will be permanently valid
token.placeholderToken: Please enter the Token value or generate it automatically
token.placeholderTag: Enter the tag name; Enter to generate tags
token.Bearer: Bearer: The token can be randomly generated or customized
token.Api-Key: Api-Key: The token can be randomly generated or customized
token.X-API-key: X-API-key: The token can be randomly generated or customized
token.Basic: Basic: usename and password need to be filled in; it can also be customized
token.headersPlaceholder: After enabling passthrough; the value of the request header will be passed to the subsequent service
token.mustSelectToken: Please select the Token(s) to be modified

openApi.tips: Note: MCP services imported through the OpenAPI document will be accessed via the STEAMABLE_HTTP protocol
openApi.support: Supports importing JSON or YAML files in OpenAPI 3.0.0 or higher version data format.
openApi.support3: Only OpenAPI 3.0 and above versions are supported
openApi.validFileFail: Please upload or select an OpenAPI document first
openApi.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one interface

hostingForm.commandTips: Note: After clicking use, the command will be overwritten and cannot be restored
hostingForm.listenUrlTips1: Default binding: 0.0.0.0 address, the gateway will automatically identify the container SVC address and route traffic into the container. No need to modify this parameter in the current running mode.
hostingForm.listenPortTips1: Default 8080, the gateway will automatically identify the container and route traffic into the container. No need to modify this parameter in the current running mode.
hostingForm.listenPortTips2: Please enter the real listening port number of the MCP service
hostingForm.listenPathTips1: The startup command will convert the STDIO protocol to the SSE protocol, and the MCP service mount path is /sse. The gateway will automatically identify the path and route the traffic in. No need to modify this parameter in the current running mode.
hostingForm.listenPathTips2: Please enter the access path mounted by the MCP service. Leave it blank for no prefix path. You can refer to the example data in the deployment template.
hostingForm.listenPathTips3: The startup command will convert the STDIO protocol to the STREAMABLEHTTP protocol, and the MCP service mount path is /mcp. The gateway will automatically identify the path and route the traffic in. No need to modify this parameter in the current running mode.
hostingForm.envNotes: Note: Environment variable configuration refers to the container's environment variable configuration, and will also be brought into the MCP service through the hosting command.
hostingForm.directTips: The current configuration of MCP service SSE / STREAMABLE HTTP protocol is in direct connection mode, mainly filling in the external MCP access configuration. The platform only plays the role of 'configuration registration center'. If you need to proxy business traffic or participate in health checks and operation monitoring, please switch to proxy mode.
